challenges.title: Background Basics
challenges.description: Write a CSS rule for the `body` element that sets `background-color` to `#f0f0f0` and `background-image` to `url('bg.png')`. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert 'body' in css.lower(), 'Should target the body element'
assert 'background-color' in css.lower(), 'Should set background-color property'
assert '#f0f0f0' in css.lower(), 'Should set background-color to #f0f0f0'
assert 'background-image' in css.lower(), 'Should set background-image property'
assert 'url(' in css.lower(), 'Should use url() for the background image'
assert 'bg.png' in css.lower(), 'Should reference bg.png as the image'
hints: Use background-image: url('bg.png'); for the image

challenges.title: Background Shorthand
challenges.description: Write a CSS rule for `.hero` that uses the `background` shorthand property to set: color `#333`, image `url('hero.jpg')`, no-repeat, and position `center center`. Also set `background-size` to `cover`. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '.hero' in css, 'Should target the .hero class'
assert 'background' in css.lower(), 'Should use background property'
assert '#333' in css.lower(), 'Should include background color #333'
assert 'url(' in css.lower(), 'Should use url() function'
assert 'hero.jpg' in css.lower(), 'Should reference hero.jpg'
assert 'no-repeat' in css.lower(), 'Should set no-repeat'
assert 'center' in css.lower(), 'Should set center position'
assert 'background-size' in css.lower(), 'Should set background-size property'
assert 'cover' in css.lower(), 'Should set background-size to cover'
hints: The background shorthand can combine color, image, repeat, and position: background: #333 url('hero.jpg') no-repeat center center;
background-size must be set as a separate property (it's not part of the shorthand in most cases)
